creator: tmseck@netcologne.de
text:
Thanks for the patch but I am not going to accept this patch, at least
not completely.

It's purpose seems to be to find out where the Squid master process
puts it's pidfile. Thankfully the rc script does not need this
information at all -- it relies on the Squid master process to do the
right thing.

However I do consider adding a configuration variable "squid_config" or
somesuch for the next update if it helps improving the script's
readabilty.
